name: next-fastapi-postgres
description: A production-ready boilerplate built with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, SQLAlchemy, and Alembic.

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "pnpm --dir frontend dev" "cd backend && uv run fastapi dev"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run fastapi dev
scripts.db:revision: cd backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate
scripts.db:upgrade: cd backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:downgrade: cd backend && uv run alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:current: cd backend && uv run alembic current
scripts.db:history: cd backend && uv run alembic history
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && uv run --group dev pytest
scripts.openapi:export: cd backend && uv run python -m scripts.export_openapi --write
scripts.openapi:check: cd backend && uv run python -m scripts.export_openapi --check
